tweets.text:
I used to think it's crazy that VCs invest in huge $1B+ valuations before a product with $0 revenue.

Here is a deep dive on 11 reasons that explain the forces driving this new world order, and why this strategy might actually... work. 

https://t.co/oQVZoVuVyJ
